§6Processing Byproducts§f

§aCollect and process byproducts from ore processing and industrial machines!§f

Byproducts are obtained from the §bInduction Smelter§f, §bPulverizer§f, and mob drops. Many serve as catalysts or crafting materials.

§6Ore Processing§f:
§b• Slag§f — Sand recipes (§e25%§f from dust+sand, §e100%§f from cobble+sand). Crafts §bRockwool§f.
§b• Rich Slag§f — Ore + dust (§e5%§f from ore+sand, §e75%§f from ore+dust). Catalyst for §e3x§f ore output.
§b• Cinnabar§f — Pulverize Destabilized Redstone Ore (§e50%§f). Catalyst for §e3x§f ore + Gold Ingot.

§6Fossil & Fluid§f:
§b• Bitumen§f — Oil Sand/Shale drop. Smelt to Crude Oil or craft Coal Coke.
§b• Coal Coke§f — Coal + Bitumen. Burns §e4x§f longer than Coal. Used for Steel.
§b• Tar§f — Oil Sand in Pulverizer (§e50%§f, §e3§f Bitumen).
§b• Clathrates§f — From fluid ores. Melt to §e250 mB§f in Magma Crucible.

§6Other§f:
§b• Sawdust§f / §bRosin§f — Pulverize logs.
§b• Sulfur§f — Blaze drops. Used in Pyrotheum Dust.
§b• Niter§f — Mined/processed. Used in Aerotheum Dust.
